meaning: adj.就职的,开始的n.就职演说
examples: In his inaugural address, the president appealed for national unity.
I popped into a newsagent's and bought my inaugural pack of Marlboros with a burning sense of shame.
However, one of the shortest inaugural addresses is also one of the best remembered and most often quoted.
Internet whizz-kids met with potential investors at a bar in Cardiff Bay in the inaugural First Tuesday meeting.
The route for the inaugural Marathon of the North that will take place in Sunderland has been revealed.
